notes: Dial from any mobile, even without SIM (112 only). 999 works on landlines.
International distress, safety and calling. Monitored by HM Coastguard.
HF international distress and calling frequency.
SAR coordination. Do not transmit unless in distress.
UK 2m FM calling frequency. Requires amateur radio licence.
2m SSB calling frequency. Useful for longer-range contacts.
UK 70cm FM calling frequency. Requires amateur radio licence.
ISM band, legal in UK at ≤25 mW ERP, no licence required.
